name: Froggy Hop (demo)
desc: The bouncy 8-bit loop from the Frog vs Toad game.

name: Cinematic
desc: A ~2-minute epic in A minor — intro, theme, bridge, climax and outro with strings, horn, brass and arps.

name: Techno
desc: A ~2-minute 128 BPM journey — intro, groove, build, drop, breakdown and a bigger second drop.
